CustomField.formula:
(IF( ISBLANK( DATEVALUE( OpportunityCloseDate__c )), TODAY(), DATEVALUE(OpportunityCloseDate__c ))-
IF( WEEKDAY( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate ) ) = 6, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) +2, IF( WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate ))= 7, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate )+1, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate ) ) )
-(ROUND(
IF( ISBLANK( DATEVALUE( OpportunityCloseDate__c )), TODAY(), DATEVALUE(OpportunityCloseDate__c ))-
IF( WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate )) = 6, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate )+2, IF( WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate ) )= 7, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate )+1, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate ) ) ) ,0)*2) )*-1
CustomField.label: OpportunityOpenTime
